name: KV
goal: Render a single key-value row with a short label and composable slotted value content.
description: Single key-value row brick. The `key` attribute is the short label; the default slot carries the value and accepts any HTML content: plain text, `<a>`, `<time>`, `<code>`, `<ce-chip>`, or future typed renderers. Follows CDR-002: values stay in children so typed renderers can compose in later.

props.name: key
props.description: Short label for the key column (identity-shaped string — e.g. "Model", "Phone", "Status").

slots.description: Value content. Accepts plain text, `<a>`, `<time>`, `<code>`, `<ce-chip>`, or any inline renderer (CDR-002).

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-4
cssVariables.description: Column gap between key and value.
